description_long: This handcart features a weathered, rectangular wooden load platform with a visibly aged and rustic finish. It is supported by four large, solid wheels, two on each side, which are attached to a robust wooden frame. The cart is equipped with two long, curved wooden handles extending from one end, designed for manual pulling or pushing. Side rails run along the length of the platform, providing some containment for cargo and preventing items from falling off. The undercarriage and wheel axles are reinforced with additional wooden struts, giving the cart a sturdy, utilitarian appearance. The overall construction suggests it is built for transporting heavy or bulky items across urban environments such as streets, markets, or parks.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with four large wheels, long curved handles, and side rails for cargo containment. The weathered platform and sturdy frame make it suitable for transporting goods in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open end of the cart with the side rails and the mesh-like front panel beneath the platform.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long, curved handles, the full length of the platform, and the two large wheels on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the platform, the side rails, and the two rear wheels, with the mesh panel visible underneath.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other pair of wheels and the handles, mirroring the features seen in view 1.
